description: The classic two-chamber refrigerator from the collection of the German manufacturer Bosch has a good ratio of cost and quality: it belongs to the middle price category and offers everything you need for efficient operation and convenient use. The total usable volume is 321 liters, of which 218 liters are occupied by the refrigerator compartment, and 103 liters by the freezer. Smart inverter technology includes sensors that constantly monitor the temperature and an electronic system that detects changes and ensures that the compressor's operating rate adapts to the current situation. The result of this combination is durability, low power consumption and quiet operation. The Multi Airflow cooling system includes two independent circuits and ensures uniform humidity and temperature throughout the entire cooling zone, from door frames to rear nooks. And the No Frost function eliminates the need to manually defrost the freezer. To organize your workspace, the Bosch KGN362IDF is equipped with height-adjustable tempered glass shelves, a separate shelf for bottles, side shelves, and three drawers in the freezer. The spacious VitaFresh XXL compartment in the refrigerator compartment deserves special attention. The humidity-controlled container is designed for storing vegetables, fruits and herbs, and the freshness zone maintains zero temperature so that meat and fish stay fresh longer. Also among the advantages of the refrigerator are the functions of quick freezing and cooling, maintaining cold for 14 hours in the absence of electricity, a touch control panel, LED lighting, the ability to hang doors and an indicator that signals an open door.
